name: HSBC RuPay Cashback Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under HSBC RuPay Cashback Credit Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waived on annual spends above Rs 2 lakh
additionalBenefits: Rs 500 cashback after logging into HSBC India app and spending Rs 10,000 within first 30 days
Rs 250 Amazon eGift Voucher for online application and video KYC
2-month EazyDiner membership on RuPay card activation
10% cashback on dining, food delivery and grocery spends
Cashback capped at up to Rs 400 per month
0% forex markup on transactions until 30 June 2026, subject to terms
2 complimentary local lounge visits per quarter and 2 international lounge visits per year
UPI payments through HSBC SimplyPay and other UPI apps
Paytm, Cleartrip, RuPay and JCB network offers as per programme terms

salaried: Age 18 to 65 years, Indian resident, minimum income Rs 6 lakh per year and eligible city residence
selfEmployed: Age 25 to 65 years, Indian resident, minimum income Rs 12 lakh per year and eligible city residence
